content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Vitamins". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1042/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of test cases. Then for each test case, there is a line containing an integer m, which is the number of elements in the array. The next line contains m space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n = int(input())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    arr.sort()
    min_val = arr[0]
    count = 0
    for i in range(1, n):
        count += arr[i] - min_val
    print(count)
